text:
どうも名前で呼んでると
調子が狂うなあ。そんなことない？

大丈夫ならいいんだけど
調子が狂ってクエストに失敗したら
私が責任感じちゃうじゃない。

私が認めた一人前のアークスらしく
カッコいいとこ見せてよね

Man, calling you by your name just throws me
off. You disagree?

If you're fine with it, then whatever, but don't
blame me if you fail a Quest because you
forgot what it's like to have a real name.

Now, get out there and remind me why I
recognized you as a full-fledged ARKS operative
in the first place!
